allow: Bash(node -e "const { Client } = require\(''@covalenthq/client-sdk''\); console.log\(typeof Client\); const c = new Client\(''test''\); console.log\(Object.keys\(c\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const { Client } = require\(''@covalenthq/client-sdk''\); const c = new Client\(''test''\); console.log\(''Balance:'', typeof c.BalanceService.getTokenHoldersForTokenAddress\); console.log\(''Streaming:'', typeof c.StreamingService\)")

Bash(node -e "const { Client } = require\(''@covalenthq/client-sdk''\); const c = new Client\(''test''\); const bs = c.BalanceService; console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(bs\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const { Client } = require\(''@covalenthq/client-sdk''\); const c = new Client\(''test''\); [''SecurityService'',''PricingService'',''TransactionService'',''XykService'',''BaseService'',''NftService''].forEach\(s => { const svc = c[s]; if\(svc\) console.log\(s+'':'', Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(svc\)\).filter\(n => n !== ''constructor''\)\) }\)")
